articles.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline - techcrunch.com
articles.description: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.
articles.content:
Google on Monday quietly released an offline-first dictation app called “Google AI Edge Eloquent” on iOS to take on the likes of Wispr Flow, SuperWhisper, Willow, and others.

articles.title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day work week - techcrunch.com
articles.description: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.
